sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
SPACE teleported the player from [15, 48] to [27, 21] - which is near the yellow cross! The yellow cross center appears to be around [21, 21]. So SPACE switches control between the blue cross and the yellow cross!
Now I control the yellow cross. The goal is likely:
- Use the blue cross to collect blue squares
- Use the yellow cross to collect yellow squares
- SPACE switches between crosses
Let me verify this by moving the yellow cross toward a yellow square and seeing if it gets collected.
Yellow squares are at: [2,14], [8,5], [8,23], [16,14]
Player is now at [27, 21] (controlling yellow cross)
Let me try moving UP to reach a yellow square.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# SPACE teleported player from [15,48] to [27,21] - switched to yellow cross!
# Now I control the yellow cross. Yellow squares: [2,14], [8,5], [8,23], [16,14]
# Player at [27, 21], need to collect yellow squares
# Try moving UP toward [16, 14]
action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
